_comment: Transcripts for the jumpcut comparison clips, keyed by the 'with smoothing' filename. Markers: [+regenerated bridge words+]. 'edits' are [startSec, endSec] spans where the bridge sits.

henry_regen_1.mp4.transcript: it does have an impact on a human being because you didn't have [+a normal young life. It's not the same.+] What you're exposed to right from the start is very difficult to deal with.

jacky_chen_regen_1.mp4.transcript: Last, not least, a million thanks to all my friends, fans around the world, because you, [+I continue making movies for kicking+] and punching, keep breaking my bones. Thank you so much. Thank you, Oscar!

diary_regen_1.mp4.transcript: friend in the in our team here is French [+and he was with us in Paris when we first met.+] And he said, if you go to Claire Fontaine, your chance of becoming a professional footballer is like 95%.
